text:
In the end, whether you have talent or passion, 
 you'll still have to give it your all.
author: Ramon Arroyo

text: You’ve got a good heart. Don’t ever lose it.
author: Vander

text: When you’re going to change the world, don’t ask for permission.
author: Viktor

text: The best way to predict the future is to build it.
author: Alan Kay

text: A jack of all trades is a master of none, but oftentimes better than a master of one.
author: Old English
